summary: Comprehensive testing of Congrats Card feature - Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: Landing page fully functional with all features. Thread page photo button code verified to include 'Create Congrats Card' option.
seed_data_creation: TEST_John Doe congrats card created during backend tests, TEST_prefixed cards remain in DB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Congrats Card feature fully implemented and tested. Pre-created test card ID: 6a304660-0e5. Backend APIs at /api/congrats/* all working. Landing page at /congrats/{cardId} displays customer photo, name, message, salesman info, Save Card button, and social share buttons (Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn).

features_tested.congrats_api_create: PASS - POST /api/congrats/create creates card with photo upload
features_tested.congrats_api_get_card: PASS - GET /api/congrats/card/{card_id} returns full card data
features_tested.congrats_api_missing_photo: PASS - Returns 422 when photo is missing
features_tested.congrats_api_invalid_action: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid track action
features_tested.landing_page_customer_photo: PASS - Circular customer photo with gold border displayed
features_tested.landing_page_message: PASS - Thank you message with customer name replacement works
features_tested.landing_page_custom_message: PASS - Custom message in italics displayed
features_tested.landing_page_salesman_info: PASS - Salesman name, title, store name displayed
features_tested.landing_page_save_card_btn: PASS - Save Card button visible and styled
features_tested.landing_page_social_share: PASS - Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn buttons visible
features_tested.landing_page_stay_connected: PASS - Call, Text, Email contact options displayed
features_tested.thread_photo_button_code: PASS - handleAttachPhoto() includes 'Create Congrats Card' option (verified in code line 400)
features_tested.thread_congrats_modal_code: PASS - Congrats Card Modal implemented with photo upload, customer name, personal note fields (lines 1324-1418)

notes.alert_dialog_limitation: The photo button options (Take Photo, Choose from Library, Create Congrats Card) use Alert.alert() which becomes a browser native alert on web - verified through code review instead of UI automation
notes.landing_page_styling: Dark theme (#1A1A1A background), gold accent (#C9A962), white text - consistent branding
